description_long: This object consists of a small transparent plastic bag containing several colorful pills and capsules. The pills are of various shapes and colors, including white, pink, orange, and blue, suggesting a mixed assortment of medications. The bag is slightly crinkled and appears to be sealed, with the contents clearly visible through the plastic. The background shows a hand holding the bag, indicating the small, portable size of the package. The pills inside are likely made of compressed powder or gel, typical of pharmaceutical tablets and capsules. There is no visible branding or printed label on the bag, and the packaging is simple and utilitarian.
description: A small transparent plastic bag containing assorted colorful pills and capsules, held in a hand. The bag is clear, unbranded, and shows a mix of medicine types inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing a clear plastic bag with several colorful pills and capsules visible inside, held by a hand.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the plastic bag, with little detail of the contents visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the plastic bag, mostly featureless and opaque due to lighting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge of the bag with minimal detail.
